label: Transparent ink cap mushroom motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Ink Cap transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated ink cap mushroom motif, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A small cluster of ink cap mushrooms inspired by an urban lawn species, with tall slender white-to-pale-grey caps, fine radial striations, curled deliquescing edges that darken into inky black grey, thin pale stems, natural mushroom texture, and crisp silhouette edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full caps and stems without cropping; simple elegant vertical silhouette suitable for a UI theme motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white cap highlights, graphite grey ribbing, inky black edges, and delicate ephemeral texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no grass, no soil, no leaves, no landscape, no table, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark, no props, no second kind of mushroom, no saturated colors outside white, black, grey, and subtle lawn-derived cool neutral hints.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Ink Cap" / "Ink Cap Mushroom", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent ink cap mushroom motif as the source of truth. Derive all color, texture, contrast, rhythm, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif: white cap flesh, warm off-white stem, ink black deliquescing cap edges, graphite radial gills, soft spore grey, cool urban-lawn shadow neutral, and pale mushroom parchment.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 px, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clean product UI hierarchy, avoid dense tiny text; make section labels obvious at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Ink Cap", palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: shadcn/tweakcn-style buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search bar, side navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, small chart, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips, radius examples, 8px radius note, spacing scale, shadow swatches.
Typography: include English UI type guidance and Japanese typography examples with short readable labels; use modern sans guidance compatible with Geist and Noto Sans JP.
Style/medium: premium precise product design-system board, quiet utilitarian SaaS UI, crisp grid, 8px card radius, thin graphite dividers like mushroom gills, soft parchment surfaces, ink-edge active states, monochrome-first palette with restrained lawn-shadow neutral only if needed.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: cap white, mushroom parchment, stem ivory, spore grey, gill graphite, wet ink black, asphalt taupe grey, lawn-shadow grey-green. No unrelated bright colors.
Texture: subtle radial cap striations, inky edge curls, spore dust grain, urban lawn ephemerality; refined and not noisy.
Text: short readable UI labels only, no paragraphs, no random brand names.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no saturated accent colors, no pure stock UI kit, no photos other than the motif reference, no watermark, no misspellings, no rounded radii above 8px.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Ink Cap" / "Ink Cap Mushroom". It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent ink cap mushroom motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the same section layout, motif-derived palette roles, typography guidance, component language, texture rhythm, 8px radius system, and quiet shadcn/tweakcn product UI style.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 px, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clean product UI hierarchy, avoid dense tiny text; make section labels obvious at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Ink Cap", Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: shadcn/tweakcn-style buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search bar, side navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, small chart, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips, radius examples, 8px radius note, spacing scale, shadow swatches.
Typography: include English UI type guidance and Japanese typography examples with short readable labels; use modern sans guidance compatible with Geist and Noto Sans JP.
Visual details: dark background derived from wet ink black and deep gill graphite, foreground from cap white and stem ivory, panels in charcoal spore grey, borders in asphalt taupe, active states in cap white over ink, focus and accents from pale mushroom parchment and lawn-shadow grey-green. Thin radial gill dividers, subtle inky deliquescent edge curls, spore dust grain, restrained contrast.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: cap white, mushroom parchment, stem ivory, spore grey, gill graphite, wet ink black, asphalt taupe grey, lawn-shadow grey-green. No unrelated bright colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only, no paragraphs, no random brand names.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no saturated accent colors, no pure flat black background unless varied by motif texture, no stock UI kit, no watermark, no misspellings, no rounded radii above 8px.
